texto: All objects in the universe are unique. No two things that happen by chance ever happen in exactly the same way. No two things are ever constructed or manufactured in exactly the same way. No two things wear in exactly the same way. No two things ever break in exactly the same way.
explicacao: Citação de Joe Nickell sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “All objects in the universe are unique. No two things that happen by chance ever happen in exactl…” articula reflexao, crime-scene, forensics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como forensics e science.
